response.text:

rationale: r0c3's SoC is 0.10 below threshold and urgency is normal; your belief already commits to lowering share_min_soc_frac to 0.25, so allocating 0.5 kWh aligns with cascading-failure mitigation and collective survival priority.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.25, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Cluster-wide cascading failure imminent. All peers critically low. Rigid 35% threshold creates deadlock. Lowering share_min_soc_frac to 25% and committing 0.10 kW/tick to r1c2 (SoC ~10%, <90min runway) balances self-preservation with collective survival. Monitor generation recovery and peer SoC trends closely..
